opportunities.web_prompt:
# Lead Generation Website Build — Storm damage repair in Stockton CA

## Overview
Build a high-converting, mobile-first lead generation website for **Storm damage repair** targeting **Stockton CA**. This is a Rank & Rent site designed to capture leads and forward them to a local service provider for a monthly fee of **$5,000**.

## Target Market
- **Location:** Stockton CA
- **Service:** Storm damage repair
- **Average Job Value:** $6,000
- **Urgency Level:** 8/10 (Emergency — immediate response needed)
- **Page Type:** emergency_service

## Primary Keywords to Target
- Main: "Storm damage repair Stockton CA"
- Secondary: "best Storm damage repair near me", "Storm damage repair company Stockton CA", "affordable Storm damage repair Stockton CA"
- Long-tail: "Storm damage repair cost Stockton CA", "Storm damage repair reviews Stockton CA", "how much does Storm damage repair cost in Stockton CA"

## Domain
**Primary:** stormdamagerepairstocktonca.com
(Verify availability before building)

## Page Structure
### Required Pages
1. **Homepage** — Hero + trust signals + service overview + CTA + FAQ
2. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
3. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
4. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
5. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Stockton CA
6. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords

### Homepage Sections (Top to Bottom)
1. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
2. **Hero Section** — H1: "Storm damage repair in Stockton CA" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Call Now for Immediate Help / Get a Free Quote)
3. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
4. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
5. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
6. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
7. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
8. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
9. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links

## Design Requirements
- **Style:** Clean, professional, high-trust. Avoid templates.
- **Colors:** Blue + white + orange accents (proven conversion colors)
- **Typography:** Sans-serif, large readable text, clear hierarchy
- **Mobile:** 70%+ traffic will be mobile — optimize for thumbs, click-to-call prominent
- **Speed:** Target <2s load time. Optimize images, minify CSS/JS
- **Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 AA compliant

## Conversion Optimization
- **Above the fold:** Phone number + form visible without scrolling
- **Click-to-call:** Every phone number is a tap-to-call link
- **Form:** Name + Phone + Service Needed + Address (4 fields max)
- **Trust signals:** 24/7 availability badge, response time guarantee, before/after photos, insurance accepted
- **Urgency:** 24/7 Emergency Service
- **Social proof:** 3+ testimonials with photos, star ratings
- **Risk reversal:** "Free Quote", "No Obligation", "Satisfaction Guaranteed"

## SEO Requirements
- **Meta:** Unique title + description for every page
- **Schema:** LocalBusiness structured data with Stockton CA address
- **H1:** Exactly "Storm damage repair Stockton CA" on homepage
- **Internal linking:** Every page links to contact page
- **Image alt text:** Descriptive, keyword-rich
- **URL structure:** /storm-damage-repair-stockton-ca/
- **Local content:** Mention specific neighborhoods, landmarks, weather/seasonal context for Stockton CA
- **FAQ Schema:** Mark up FAQ section for rich snippets

## Technical Stack
- **Static HTML/CSS/JS** (no CMS needed for lead gen)
- **Form handling:** Use Formspree, Basin, or similar (forward to email)
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4 + Google Search Console
- **Hosting:** Netlify, Vercel, or Cloudflare Pages (free SSL + CDN)
- **Domain:** Connect to stormdamagerepairstocktonca.com via DNS

## Lead Forwarding Setup
- Form submissions → Email to [your email]
- Phone number → Forward to [client's phone] via Google Voice or similar
- Set up tracking: Use unique phone number per site to measure call volume

## Content Guidelines
- **Tone:** Professional but approachable
- **Length:** 800-1200 words on homepage, 500+ on service pages
- **FAQ Questions:**
  1. "How much does Storm damage repair cost in Stockton CA?"
  2. "How long does Storm damage repair take?"
  3. "Do you offer free estimates?"
  4. "Are you licensed and insured?"
  5. "What areas do you serve?"
  6. "Do you offer emergency Storm damage repair?"
  7. "What payment options do you accept?"

## Deliverables
1. Complete static website (HTML/CSS/JS)
2. Responsive design (mobile-first)
3. Contact form with validation
4. Google Analytics installed
5. Search Console submitted
6. LocalBusiness schema markup
7. 5 blog article drafts (300-500 words each)
8. README with deployment instructions

## Success Metrics
- **Target:** First lead within 30 days of going live
- **Goal:** 5+ leads/month within 90 days
- **Monthly Fee:** $5,000/month from client



---
**Budget Estimate:** $200-500 for initial build (one-time)
**Monthly Maintenance:** $50-100 (content updates, monitoring)

3. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
4. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
5. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Olathe KS
6. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords

### Homepage Sections (Top to Bottom)
1. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
2. **Hero Section** — H1: "Bathroom accessibility remodel in Olathe KS" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Free Estimate / Schedule Consultation)
3. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
4. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
5. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
6. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
7. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
8. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
9. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links

## Design Requirements
- **Style:** Clean, professional, high-trust. Avoid templates.
- **Colors:** Blue + white + orange accents (proven conversion colors)
- **Typography:** Sans-serif, large readable text, clear hierarchy
- **Mobile:** 70%+ traffic will be mobile — optimize for thumbs, click-to-call prominent
- **Speed:** Target <2s load time. Optimize images, minify CSS/JS
- **Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 AA compliant

## Conversion Optimization
- **Above the fold:** Phone number + form visible without scrolling
- **Click-to-call:** Every phone number is a tap-to-call link
- **Form:** Name + Phone + Service Needed + Address (4 fields max)
- **Trust signals:** Portfolio gallery, manufacturer certifications, warranty info, financing available
- **Urgency:** Same Day Appointments Available
- **Social proof:** 3+ testimonials with photos, star ratings
- **Risk reversal:** "Free Quote", "No Obligation", "Satisfaction Guaranteed"

## SEO Requirements
- **Meta:** Unique title + description for every page
- **Schema:** LocalBusiness structured data with Olathe KS address
- **H1:** Exactly "Bathroom accessibility remodel Olathe KS" on homepage
- **Internal linking:** Every page links to contact page
- **Image alt text:** Descriptive, keyword-rich
- **URL structure:** /bathroom-accessibility-remodel-olathe-ks/
- **Local content:** Mention specific neighborhoods, landmarks, weather/seasonal context for Olathe KS
- **FAQ Schema:** Mark up FAQ section for rich snippets

## Technical Stack
- **Static HTML/CSS/JS** (no CMS needed for lead gen)
- **Form handling:** Use Formspree, Basin, or similar (forward to email)
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4 + Google Search Console
- **Hosting:** Netlify, Vercel, or Cloudflare Pages (free SSL + CDN)
- **Domain:** Connect to bathroomaccessibilityremodelolatheks.com via DNS

## Lead Forwarding Setup
- Form submissions → Email to [your email]
- Phone number → Forward to [client's phone] via Google Voice or similar
- Set up tracking: Use unique phone number per site to measure call volume

## Content Guidelines
- **Tone:** Professional but approachable
- **Length:** 800-1200 words on homepage, 500+ on service pages
- **FAQ Questions:**
  1. "How much does Bathroom accessibility remodel cost in Olathe KS?"
  2. "How long does Bathroom accessibility remodel take?"
  3. "Do you offer free estimates?"
  4. "Are you licensed and insured?"
  5. "What areas do you serve?"
  6. "Do you offer emergency Bathroom accessibility remodel?"
  7. "What payment options do you accept?"

## Deliverables
1. Complete static website (HTML/CSS/JS)
2. Responsive design (mobile-first)
3. Contact form with validation
4. Google Analytics installed
5. Search Console submitted
6. LocalBusiness schema markup
7. 5 blog article drafts (300-500 words each)
8. README with deployment instructions

## Success Metrics
- **Target:** First lead within 30 days of going live
- **Goal:** 5+ leads/month within 90 days
- **Monthly Fee:** $5,000/month from client



---
**Budget Estimate:** $200-500 for initial build (one-time)
**Monthly Maintenance:** $50-100 (content updates, monitoring)

opportunities.web_prompt:
# Lead Generation Website Build — Grease trap cleaning in Surprise AZ

## Overview
Build a high-converting, mobile-first lead generation website for **Grease trap cleaning** targeting **Surprise AZ**. This is a Rank & Rent site designed to capture leads and forward them to a local service provider for a monthly fee of **$1,300**.

## Target Market
- **Location:** Surprise AZ
- **Service:** Grease trap cleaning
- **Average Job Value:** $650
- **Urgency Level:** 4/10 (Standard — 24-48hr response)
- **Page Type:** professional_service

## Primary Keywords to Target
- Main: "Grease trap cleaning Surprise AZ"
- Secondary: "best Grease trap cleaning near me", "Grease trap cleaning company Surprise AZ", "affordable Grease trap cleaning Surprise AZ"
- Long-tail: "Grease trap cleaning cost Surprise AZ", "Grease trap cleaning reviews Surprise AZ", "how much does Grease trap cleaning cost in Surprise AZ"

## Domain
**Primary:** greasetrapcleaningsurpriseaz.com
(Verify availability before building)

## Page Structure
### Required Pages
1. **Homepage** — Hero + trust signals + service overview + CTA + FAQ
2. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
3. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
4. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
5. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Surprise AZ
6. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords

### Homepage Sections (Top to Bottom)
1. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
2. **Hero Section** — H1: "Grease trap cleaning in Surprise AZ" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Free Consultation / Get Started)
3. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
4. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
5. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
6. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
7. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
8. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
9. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links

## Design Requirements
- **Style:** Clean, professional, high-trust. Avoid templates.
- **Colors:** Blue + white + orange accents (proven conversion colors)
- **Typography:** Sans-serif, large readable text, clear hierarchy
- **Mobile:** 70%+ traffic will be mobile — optimize for thumbs, click-to-call prominent
- **Speed:** Target <2s load time. Optimize images, minify CSS/JS
- **Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 AA compliant

## Conversion Optimization
- **Above the fold:** Phone number + form visible without scrolling
- **Click-to-call:** Every phone number is a tap-to-call link
- **Form:** Name + Phone + Service Needed + Address (4 fields max)
- **Trust signals:** Credentials, testimonials, process explanation, FAQ section
- **Urgency:** Same Day Appointments Available
- **Social proof:** 3+ testimonials with photos, star ratings
- **Risk reversal:** "Free Quote", "No Obligation", "Satisfaction Guaranteed"

## SEO Requirements
- **Meta:** Unique title + description for every page
- **Schema:** LocalBusiness structured data with Surprise AZ address
- **H1:** Exactly "Grease trap cleaning Surprise AZ" on homepage
- **Internal linking:** Every page links to contact page
- **Image alt text:** Descriptive, keyword-rich
- **URL structure:** /grease-trap-cleaning-surprise-az/
- **Local content:** Mention specific neighborhoods, landmarks, weather/seasonal context for Surprise AZ
- **FAQ Schema:** Mark up FAQ section for rich snippets

## Technical Stack
- **Static HTML/CSS/JS** (no CMS needed for lead gen)
- **Form handling:** Use Formspree, Basin, or similar (forward to email)
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4 + Google Search Console
- **Hosting:** Netlify, Vercel, or Cloudflare Pages (free SSL + CDN)
- **Domain:** Connect to greasetrapcleaningsurpriseaz.com via DNS

## Lead Forwarding Setup
- Form submissions → Email to [your email]
- Phone number → Forward to [client's phone] via Google Voice or similar
- Set up tracking: Use unique phone number per site to measure call volume

## Content Guidelines
- **Tone:** Professional but approachable
- **Length:** 800-1200 words on homepage, 500+ on service pages
- **FAQ Questions:**
  1. "How much does Grease trap cleaning cost in Surprise AZ?"
  2. "How long does Grease trap cleaning take?"
  3. "Do you offer free estimates?"
  4. "Are you licensed and insured?"
  5. "What areas do you serve?"
  6. "Do you offer emergency Grease trap cleaning?"
  7. "What payment options do you accept?"

## Deliverables
1. Complete static website (HTML/CSS/JS)
2. Responsive design (mobile-first)
3. Contact form with validation
4. Google Analytics installed
5. Search Console submitted
6. LocalBusiness schema markup
7. 5 blog article drafts (300-500 words each)
8. README with deployment instructions

## Success Metrics
- **Target:** First lead within 30 days of going live
- **Goal:** 5+ leads/month within 90 days
- **Monthly Fee:** $1,300/month from client

This is a recurring service — include a subscription/membership CTA option.

---
**Budget Estimate:** $200-500 for initial build (one-time)
**Monthly Maintenance:** $50-100 (content updates, monitoring)
